S.FORM: Yin-cu-mincu-way-yin-huwey Yin-cu-mincu-weyin-huwey (sapuru han a panganga –Yin-min-huwey) u miebaway, u mipadamaay tu demak nu masaniyaniyaru'ay a tarakaway a Seyhu nu mita i Taywan. Na i 1996 a miheca tu sabaw tusa a bulad a nipatireng. U miebaway, u padamaay tu masama:anay a demakan nu yin-cu-min i Sey-hu. Pi'arawan to lakaw 原住民族委員會
S.PHON: jin-ʦo~u~u-minʦo~u~u-waj-jin-ħo~u~uwəj jin-ʦo~u~u-minʦo~u~u-wəjin-ħo~u~uwəj (sapo~u~uro~u~u ħan a paŋaŋa *jin-min-ħo~u~uwəj) o~u~u miəb~b~vawaj, o~u~u mipaɬ~ɮamaaj to~u~u ɬ~ɮəmak no~u~u masanijanijaro~u~uʡaj a tarakawaj a səjħo~u~u no~u~u mita i tajwan. na i **** a miħəʦa to~u~u sab~b~vaw to~u~usa a b~b~vo~u~uɾaɬ~ɮ a nipatirəŋ. o~u~u miəb~b~vawaj, o~u~u paɬ~ɮamaaj to~u~u masama:anaj a ɬ~ɮəmakan no~u~u jin-ʦo~u~u-min i səj-ħo~u~u. piʡarawan to~u ɾakaw *******
S.FORM: Yin-cu-mincu-way-yin-huwey Yin-cu-mincu-weyin-huwey (sapuru han a panganga –Yin-min-huwey) u miebaway, u mipadamaay tu demak nu masaniyaniyaru'ay a tarakaway a Seyhu nu mita i Taywan. Na i 1996 a miheca tu sabaw tusa a bulad a nipatireng. U miebaway, u padamaay tu masama:anay a demakan nu yin-cu-min i Sey-hu. Pi'arawan to lakaw 原住民族委員會
S.PHON: jin-ʦo~u~u-minʦo~u~u-waj-jin-ħo~u~uwəj jin-ʦo~u~u-minʦo~u~u-wəjin-ħo~u~uwəj (sapo~u~uro~u~u ħan a paŋaŋa *jin-min-ħo~u~uwəj) o~u~u miəb~b~vawaj, o~u~u mipaɬ~ɮamaaj to~u~u ɬ~ɮəmak no~u~u masanijanijaro~u~uʡaj a tarakawaj a səjħo~u~u no~u~u mita i tajwan. na i **** a miħəʦa to~u~u sab~b~vaw to~u~usa a b~b~vo~u~uɾaɬ~ɮ a nipatirəŋ. o~u~u miəb~b~vawaj, o~u~u paɬ~ɮamaaj to~u~u masama:anaj a ɬ~ɮəmakan no~u~u jin-ʦo~u~u-min i səj-ħo~u~u. piʡarawan to~u ɾakaw *******
